title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Sports Authority India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Sports Authority India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sports Authority India Capital India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sports Authority India Capital India:
Sports Authority India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India Capital India!
